'''chazhasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pygmaliosexual|pygmaliosexual]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-zh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pygmaliosexual|pygmaliosexual]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chazhasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || chæzhæsæth || chæzhæsæj || chæzhæsæsh || chæzhæsæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || chazhazhasath || chazhazhasaj || chazhazhasash || chazhazhasa
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || chazhasath || chazhasaj || chazhasash || chazhasa
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || chazhafsafth || chazhafsafj || chazhafsafsh || chazhafsaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || chazhasatha || chazhasaja || chazhasasha || chazhasaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || chazhasath || chazhasaj || chazhasash || chazhasa
|-
| [[Possessive]] || chazhasathal || chazhasajal || chazhasashal || chazhasakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || chazhasaathatha || chazhasaajaja || chazhasaashasha || chazhasaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || chazhasathan || chazhasajan || chazhasashan || chazhasakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || chazhasathaoro || chazhasajaoro || chazhasashaoro || chazhasakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
